title: Honorverse Ship-Class Registry
description: First-cut schema (v0.1.0) for the ship-class registry. A registry file wraps an array of ship classes. Each class — and each technical sub-block — carries a 'canon' flag, and numeric fields that we derived or fabricated are listed by name in a 'derived' array on their block.

weapon_code_legend.description: Legend for the compact armament codes used in canon infoboxes.

canonFlag.description: true = established in canon; false = derived/fabricated by us.

techBlock.description: A technical sub-block. 'canon' marks whether it is canon-grounded; 'derived' lists any numeric fields within it that we fabricated/inferred (so those specific fields are NOT canon even when the block is).

affiliation_nation_id.description: FK to a nation file id.

also_known_as.description: e.g. a sister navy's name for the same design.

acceleration.description: normal_g (sustained, with compensator safety margin) and max_g (emergency, zero-margin). The sim's max_accel_g should generally take max_g (fall back to normal_g). Canon sometimes gives only one figure; the normal:max ratio is NOT a fixed constant across classes.

armament.description: summary (verbatim canon text) plus optional by_arc breakdown {broadside, fore/chase, aft} with weapon-code counts. See weapon_code_legend.
